title: hippion filiforme
side_effects: Hippion filiforme can have side effects if used improperly, such as stomach upset, dizziness, and nausea, particularly if ingested in large quantities. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to kidney damage and liver dysfunction. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. In extreme cases, severe allergic reactions can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening condition that requires immediate medical attention.
